top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2011 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ps.time;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2011 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ps.lap, ps.stop;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2011 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ps.time;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2011 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ps.lap, ps.stop;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2011 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ps.time;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2011 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ps.lap, ps.stop;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2011 AND r.name LIKE '%Australian%'
ORDER BY ps.time;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, ps.duration
FROM pitStops ps
JOIN drivers d ON ps.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON ps.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2011 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ps.time;
